'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 120''' is the one hundred twentieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 14]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[James McFadden]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[The Force/Legends|The Force]] in balance
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]]
*Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*[[3D-4X]]
*[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]
